name: Fruited Cheese Log
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak apricots in 1 cup of water for 2 hours. Drain and chop.
2. Blend the cheeses.
3. Add remaining ingredients, fruits last, mixing thoroughly between additions.
4. Turn out onto a sheet of foil and shape into one 9-inch log or two large balls.
5. Wrap securely and chill until firm.
6. Roll in chopped nuts, cover again in foil, and refrigerate for 24 hours before serving (may be frozen).
7. Garnish with cherries and grapes.
